title: Funis Rebuild Site
wikitext:
[]: Funi's Rebuild Site             Quote Post by schismatics » Thu Nov 12, 2009 4:50 pm http://www.funimation.com/evangelion/ There's actually stuff on it now.

[]: Re: Funi's Rebuild Site             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Nov 12, 2009 5:57 pm schismatics wrote: http://www.funimation.com/evangelion/ There's actually stuff on it now.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Thu Nov 12, 2009 6:15 pm The Rebuild website wrote: What are we attempting to create by doing this once more?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Nov 12, 2009 6:17 pm Front Page'd: http://www.evageeks.org/2009/11/eva-1-0-website-by-funimation/

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Thu Nov 12, 2009 6:49 pm That's Rebuild? I mean, they're actually using the same animation cells as far as I can tell. Sure there's some new footage....but. Why do we have spoiler tags for this stuff again?

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Thu Nov 12, 2009 6:56 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: That's Rebuild? I mean, they're actually using the same animation cells as far as I can tell. Sure there's some new footage....but. Why do we have spoiler tags for this stuff again?

[]:             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Thu Nov 12, 2009 7:16 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: That's Rebuild? I mean, they're actually using the same animation cells as far as I can tell. Sure there's some new footage....but.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Thu Nov 12, 2009 10:30 pm Either the Funimation website has clips from the theatrical version of the movie or they got a wonky version of 1.01 cause it's loaded with EmArgencies. ...why does Ritsuko sound so butch. And what the fuck is up with that tagline? I mean it sounds so negative. "What the fuck are we even trying to achieve here?" ....Looking at the clips. the little Flanger effect on voices in the entry plug are more distracting than anything. I mean with all the technology these guys have you'd think they could do proper voice projectors. ....and whoa, what happened to Toji and Kensuke? I promise that's my last re-edit...though Rei's in the next clip. FINAL EDIT: Ok. So it's a bummer Shinji calls her Rei and not Ayanami. But it's a different interpretation by the dubbers so that's alright. And simply based on the way her voice sounds the new girl playing Rei is a slight improvement (though her "Listen" line was a bit...bitchy?). Only question I want to ask is why is Rei doing a William Shatner impression? "We...will go.... to the fountain and.... fire a shot at.... the target. "

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Nov 12, 2009 11:19 pm Um, as mentioned on the front page post, the "What were we trying to achieve again" (click the text) is from Anno's statement back in 2007 about Webuild and the link to it, but having that info somewhere on the site would have been nice that Anno said it.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Thu Nov 12, 2009 11:46 pm I get where the line comes from. It's just I mean, could they have chosen a worse more apathetic line? To the uninitiated (which is 95% of anime watchers who's relation to Eva is either they watched it once and liked it, hated it, or haven't seen it cause it's "soo old") the overall feeling of that line out of context is- "Even we don't really know what we're doing. But we did. So fucking buy it" ...and Ritsuko's new voice is TURible.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Nov 12, 2009 11:55 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Front Page'd: http://www.evageeks.org/2009/11/eva-1-0-website-by-funimation/

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Nov 13, 2009 12:29 am The Eva Monkey wrote: Sailor Star Dust wrote: Front Page'd: http://www.evageeks.org/2009/11/eva-1-0-website-by-funimation/

[]:             Quote Post by Heromaster111 » Fri Nov 13, 2009 3:39 am Gendo'sPapa wrote: ...and Ritsuko's new voice is TURible.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Nov 13, 2009 3:51 am No. But an ACTRESS might be nice.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Nov 13, 2009 9:13 am Gendo'sPapa wrote: ...and Ritsuko's new voice is TURible.

[]:             Quote Post by Taekmkm » Fri Nov 13, 2009 12:43 pm Only question I want to ask is why is Rei doing a William Shatner impression?

[]:             Quote Post by Lagann » Fri Nov 13, 2009 2:59 pm Wait look at those clips on the website,especially the launch of 01 . Dont they look brighter,like they came from 1.11? The people who already have the new dvd said its got the same darkness problems as before so whats the deal with these clips?

[]:             Quote Post by Sceleris » Fri Nov 13, 2009 3:08 pm Apparently, the page (well, every page on funimation.com) reroutes to [url]http://www.navarre.com/funimation/[/url] for foreigners like me. How awesomely stupid that I have to use a proxy just to visit a promotional site. (Then again, so did the Japanese with the streaming trailers.) Just an observation.

[]:             Quote Post by Taekmkm » Fri Nov 13, 2009 3:38 pm Their digital distribution only covers USA. Blame copyright.

[]:             Quote Post by sedemihcrA » Fri Nov 13, 2009 5:01 pm Was anyone else surprised that the dub was like... actually okay sounding? Not too much "I'm reading this to a big wall" going on there. Although I thought Gendo sounded a lot less menacing than in his dub from the series. :(
summary:
[]: Funi's Rebuild Site             Quote Post by schismatics » Thu Nov 12, 2009 4:50 pm http://www.funimation.com/evangelion/ There's actually stuff on it now.

[]: Re: Funi's Rebuild Site             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Nov 12, 2009 5:57 pm schismatics wrote: http://www.funimation.com/evangelion/ There's actually stuff on it now.

Article: Funis Rebuild Site
 Funimation website has clips from the theatrical version of the movie or they got a wonky version of 1.01 cause it's loaded with EmArgencies. ...why does Ritsuko sound so butch. And what the fuck is up with that tagline? I mean it sounds so negative. "What the fuck are we even trying to achieve here?" ....Looking at the clips. the little Flanger effect on voices in the entry plug are more distracting than anything. I mean with all the technology these guys have you'd think they could do proper voice projectors. ....and whoa, what happened to Toji and Kensuke? I promise that's my last re-edit...though Rei's in the next clip. FINAL EDIT: Ok. So it's a bummer Shinji calls her Rei and not Ayanami. But it's a different interpretation by the dubbers so that's alright. And simply based on the way her voice sounds the new girl playing Rei is a slight improvement (though her "Listen" line was a bit...bitchy?). Only question I want to ask is why is Rei doing a William Shatner impression? "We...will go.... to the fountain and.... fire a shot at.... the target. "
